notes.note:
Fixed "Remove from download history" also deleting the downloaded file from the device. [(Bug 2051041)][1]
[1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2051041

Fixed the tab strip in the toolbar becoming unresponsive to horizontal swipes when the "Swipe toolbar to open tabs" gesture was enabled. [(Bug 2049750)][1] 

[1]: https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2049750

text:
Thanks for using Firefox! Have feedback or suggestions? Join the conversation on [Mozilla Connect][1]. Need help? Our volunteer support community has you covered on [Mozilla Support][2] 

[1]: https://connect.mozilla.org/
[2]: https://mzl.la/AndroidSupport
title: Firefox for Android 152.0.5 Release
